channel.title: Posts on Darklane Theme Demo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Darklane Theme Demo

item.title: Layout Shortcodes
item.description:
Darklane’s layout shortcodes give you multi-column control in Hugo—just wrap your content in simple tags.

This post demonstrates the layout, cell, and md shortcodes.

item.title: More Shortcode Examples
item.description:
Darklane includes layout and styling shortcodes for enhanced content control.

This post demonstrates the gallery, space, columns, color, and hr shortcodes.

item.title: Shortcode Examples
item.description:
Darklane includes several custom shortcodes to enhance your content beyond standard Markdown.

This post demonstrates the alert, highlight, details, img, tab, tabgroup, table, and youtube shortcodes.

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: This post demonstrates the standard Markdown formatting features supported by Darklane.

item.title: Welcome to Darklane
item.description: Welcome to the Darklane theme demo! This is a simple example post to showcase the basic layout and styling.
